# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup
Resources:
  Queue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400 # in seconds (24 hours)
      VisibilityTimeout: 30 # in seconds
  Topic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: SQSPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: '*'
            Resource: !GetAtt Queue.Arn # allow all message operations on the queue
  Subscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt Queue.Arn
      TopicArn: !Ref Topic
Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Value: !GetAtt Queue.QueueUrl
  TopicArn:
    Value: !Ref Topic
